positive: Minimalist circular graphic design featuring a stylized, majestic celestial fox (Kitsune) sitting elegantly on a single glowing crescent moon. The fox should have flowing, symmetrical fur lines and ethereal whiskers. Style: Japanese Ukiyo-e meets Art Deco linework, using thick, clean outlines and negative space. Color direction: Deep indigo blue, gold foil accents, and off-white. Composition: Central focus, perfect for repeating pattern or single garment print. Lighting: Soft, dramatic, and luminous, highlighting the silhouette. Details: Highly clean vector art quality, suitable for screen printing or DTG printing.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, watermark, text, signature, logo, messy, poor anatomy, extra limbs, bad hands, jpeg artifacts, low resolution, grain, noise, bright colors, busy background
